title: Wynncraft Boltslinger Visibility & Hearing Pack
description: Massively reduces the visibility issues caused by Boltslinger.
body:
Are you tired of your boltslinger in the party finder taking over your screen? This Resource pack massively helps with that issue! 

<!> WARNING <!> This resourcepack may have unintended side effects outside of its intended use and content within Wynncraft. 

- Edits to arrows.png to reduce the size of arrows
- Edits to flame.png to reduce the size of the fire particles
- Reduced the loudness to minecraft/sounds/damage hit1.ogg, hit2.ogg, hit3.ogg by 11 decibels.
